nasb.text: Now, my son, the Lord be with you that you may be successful, and build the house of the Lord your God just as He has spoken concerning you.

esv.text: “Now, my son, the Lord be with you, so that you may succeed in building the house of the Lord your God, as he has spoken concerning you.

cnv.text: 深願耶和華賜你聰明和智慧，使你治理以色列的時候，謹守耶和華你的　神的律法。

ccb.text: “儿啊，愿耶和华与你同在，使你亨通，照你的上帝耶和华的吩咐去建造祂的殿。
